info.name: Basic XSS Prober - Cross-Site Scripting
info.description: A cross-site scripting vulnerability was discovered via generic testing. Manual testing is needed to verify exploitation.

request:
GET /www/XSS/XSS_level5.php/%61%27%22%3e%3c%69%6e%6a%65%63%74%61%62%6c%65%3e HTTP/1.1
Host: localhost:9991
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Debian; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
Connection: close
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Accept-Encoding: gzip
